query:
INSERT INTO drive_push_queue (target_folder, target_subpath, file_name, content_text, mime_type, status, created_at) VALUES
('future_worksheets', '', 'README.md',
 '# Future Worksheets — planning bench

Grab-bag of worksheets and printables lined up with Reagan''s next 2-3 weeks. Pull from here when she finishes early or you are planning ahead.

## Layout
- Math — decimals, multi-digit multiplication, line plots, volume & units
- ELA — independent reading, essay prompts, context clues, presenting findings
- Science — matter & interactions, conservation, scientific method
- Social Studies — government & economics unit 4
- Fun extras — mazes, coloring, nature scavenger hunts, journal prompts
- Specials — minimal: anxiety + gratitude

Each subject has an `_index.md` with topics + free online sources. Drop PDFs in as you generate them.
',
 'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),
('future_worksheets', 'Math', '_index.md',
 '# Math — next 2-3 weeks

## Open topics (Topics 10-12)
- Place value & decimals to thousandths
- Multi-digit multiplication & division
- Story problems / mixed practice (PS-1)
- Line plots (Topic 10)
- Volume & unit cubes (Topic 11)
- Customary & metric conversions (Topic 12)

## Free online sources
- Khan Academy 5th grade — https://www.khanacademy.org/math/cc-fifth-grade-math
- K5 Learning — https://www.k5learning.com/free-math-worksheets/fifth-grade-5
- Math-Drills — https://www.math-drills.com/
- Super Teacher — https://www.superteacherworksheets.com/full-math.html
- Common Core Sheets — https://www.commoncoresheets.com/
',
 'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),
('future_worksheets', 'ELA', '_index.md',
 '# ELA — next 2-3 weeks

## Topics
- Independent reading comprehension (Michael''s World style)
- Writing an essay on a topic of choice
- Context clues / word meaning
- Presenting findings (research project)
- Module 4 — Breaking Barriers

## Free online sources
- CommonLit — https://www.commonlit.org/en/library
- ReadWorks — https://www.readworks.org/
- Newsela — https://newsela.com/
- K5 Learning ELA — https://www.k5learning.com/free-worksheets-for-kids/fifth-grade-5/reading
- Super Teacher — https://www.superteacherworksheets.com/full-reading.html
',
 'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),
('future_worksheets', 'Science', '_index.md',
 '# Science — next 2-3 weeks

## Topics
- Matter & its interactions (Unit 4)
- Conservation of matter in physical & chemical change
- Scientific method — observation logs

## Free online sources
- NASA Kids Club — https://www.nasa.gov/kidsclub
- Mystery Science — https://mysteryscience.com/
- Generation Genius — https://www.generationgenius.com/
- Ohio Science Standards 5th — https://education.ohio.gov/Topics/Learning-in-Ohio/Science
',
 'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),
('future_worksheets', 'Social Studies', '_index.md',
 '# Social Studies — next 2-3 weeks

## Topics
- Unit 4 — Government & Economics
- Purpose & structure of government
- Scarcity, trade, and economic choices

## Free online sources
- iCivics — https://www.icivics.org/
- Ohio Social Studies — https://education.ohio.gov/Topics/Learning-in-Ohio/Social-Studies
- Constitution Center for Kids — https://constitutioncenter.org/learn
- Ben''s Guide — https://bensguide.gpo.gov/
',
 'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),
('future_worksheets', 'Fun extras', '_index.md',
 '# Fun extras — finished-early grab-bag

Keep stocked with printables Reagan can choose from.

## Categories
- Mazes (Krazy Dad)
- Coloring (nature, animals, mandalas)
- Word searches
- Nature scavenger hunts
- Journal prompts (single page)
- Gratitude pages (3 things today)
- Bird-watching log
- Origami one-page instructions

## Free sources
- Krazy Dad mazes — https://krazydad.com/mazes/
- Education.com coloring — https://www.education.com/worksheets/coloring/
- Crayola printables — https://www.crayola.com/free-coloring-pages/
- Audubon bird coloring — https://www.audubon.org/coloring-book
',
 'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),
('future_worksheets', 'Specials', '_index.md',
 '# Specials — minimal set

Keep this folder small. Just one or two pages on hand.

## What to keep
- One anxiety-trigger reflection sheet
- One gratitude journal page

## Optional
- A breathing exercise card
- A mood color wheel

Less is more.
',
 'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW());
